header.subtitle: local browser-side analysis - nothing is sent to a server unless you explicitly run the HIBP check

notice.title: Security:
notice.beforeHash: - no password is sent to a server during local analysis. The only exception is the HIBP check triggered by the button: it sends only the
notice.hash: first 5 characters of the SHA-1 hash
notice.afterHash: through k-anonymity, never the full password.

input.title: Password / passphrase input
input.placeholder: type the password or passphrase to analyze...

entropy.title: Entropy
entropy.theoreticalSub: {{length}} chars x log2({{charsetSize}}) - simplified charset estimate
entropy.effectiveSub: log2({{guesses}} guesses) - accounts for real-world patterns
entropy.unicodeNote: ⓘ Non-ASCII characters detected: the theoretical charset estimate is approximate and may not reflect the real alphabet being used.
entropy.generalNote: ⓘ Theoretical entropy is optimistic and should not replace pattern-based evaluation. Prefer effective/conservative entropy for practical decisions.
entropy.placeholder: ↑ enter a password to start the analysis
entropy.conservativeSub: min(theoretical, effective): safer estimate for human-chosen passwords

crack.title: Estimated crack time
crack.note: ⓘ Estimate based on {{guesses}} zxcvbn guesses. "Avg" assumes success halfway through the search space; "max" assumes a full search. These scenarios are indicative, not universal.
crack.rateHint: You can edit guesses/sec to better match your real attack scenario.

hardware.label: Hardware profile
hardware.note: Profiles are indicative benchmark presets; you can fine-tune rates manually below.

workstation.label: GPU workstation
workstation.description: Dedicated GPU machine tuned for password cracking.

hardware.remoteError: Unable to load remote profiles, local fallback enabled.

feedback.title: Qualitative analysis (zxcvbn)
feedback.none: No obvious structural weakness detected by zxcvbn
feedback.predictablePatterns: Effective entropy is about {{delta}} bits below the theoretical estimate: predictable patterns or common words are present
feedback.leadingTrailingSpaces: The password starts or ends with spaces: verify that this is intentional

hibp.title: Have I Been Pwned - breach check
hibp.idle: Enter a password and then press the button
hibp.reset: Password changed: run the breach check again
hibp.safe: ✓ Not found in the HIBP dataset
hibp.found: ⚠ Found {{occurrences}} times - change this password now
hibp.error: Error: {{message}} - network unavailable or service unreachable
hibp.noteLine1: ⓘ Uses k-anonymity: only SHA1[0:5] is sent to api.pwnedpasswords.com - the password never leaves the browser.
hibp.noteLine2: Online request may leak metadata (e.g. IP/timing). Run only if you accept this tradeoff.
hibp.consent: I confirm the online HIBP check (hash prefix only, never full password).

errors.network: Network unavailable. Check your connection and retry.
errors.serviceUnavailable: HIBP service is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
errors.rateLimited: You reached a temporary request limit. Wait and retry.
errors.cryptoUnavailable: Web Crypto is unavailable in this browser.

online_throttled.label: Rate-limited online
online_throttled.desc: Login protected by rate limits, CAPTCHA, or lockout

slow_hash.label: Slow offline hash
slow_hash.desc: bcrypt / Argon2 / scrypt - intentionally expensive KDF

fast_hash.label: Fast offline hash
fast_hash.desc: Fast hashes or poorly protected leaks

analysisContext.title: Local analysis context
analysisContext.description: Words related to you (name, company, product, slang) make estimates more realistic.
analysisContext.placeholder: e.g. mario, acme, london, team, brand... (comma separated)
